name: Chisago Lakes Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Chisago Lakes Middle School in Lindstrom, MN! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Chisago Lakes Wildcat Community Center
description: Chisago Lakes Wildcat Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lindstrom, MN. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: North Branch High School
description: North Branch High School is a place to play pickleball in North Branch, MN. There are 14 courts. 8 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Northwood Park Courts
description: New courts in 2024. Center divider with room for spectators. Fully fenced.
